name: syncora
description: Syncora - CRM SaaS orienté opérations terrain (monorepo TypeScript).

scripts.backend: docker compose up -d --wait && npm run backend:run
scripts.backend:datadog: docker compose --profile datadog up -d --wait && npm run backend:run
scripts.backend:run: wait-on -t 60000 tcp:localhost:27017 && concurrently -n org,users,permissions,fleet,technicians,dossiers,stock,customers,subscriptions,notifications,documents,gateway "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/organizations-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/users-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/permissions-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/fleet-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/technicians-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/cases-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/stock-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/customers-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/subscriptions-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/notifications-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/documents-service" "sh -c 'wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:3001 tcp:127.0.0.1:3002 tcp:127.0.0.1:3003 tcp:127.0.0.1:3004 tcp:127.0.0.1:3005 tcp:127.0.0.1:3006 tcp:127.0.0.1:3007 tcp:127.0.0.1:3008 tcp:127.0.0.1:3009 tcp:127.0.0.1:3010 tcp:127.0.0.1:3011 || true; exec npm run start:dev -w @syncora/api-gateway'"
